# Perseverance AI

> AI readiness analysis for developer documentation. Check if AI search engines can find, read, and cite your docs.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://gamma.perseveranceai.com/): AI readiness scanner for documentation pages
- [Education](https://gamma.perseveranceai.com/education): Guides on optimizing docs for AI search
- [About](https://gamma.perseveranceai.com/about): About Perseverance AI
- [Contact / Waitlist](https://gamma.perseveranceai.com/contact): Join the waitlist for early access

## Education Articles

- [The Research Behind AI-Ready Documentation](https://gamma.perseveranceai.com/education/research-behind-ai-ready-docs): AI Readiness | 3 min read
- [How AI Search Finds, Processes, and Cites Your Docs](https://gamma.perseveranceai.com/education/how-ai-search-finds-and-cites-docs): AI Discoverability | 3 min read
